tracks.title: Static Voices in the Void
tracks.generated_lyrics:
[Verse]
The oxygen gauge hums a low silver tune
Against the backdrop of a hollow white moon
I watch the wreckage of the decades float by
Suspended in the velvet fluid of the sky
My tether is a ghost of a frayed copper line
While gravity resigns from this grand design

[Verse]
Relics of orbit gather dust made of stars
Rusted antenna reaching out toward Mars
They pulse with the cadence of a heart long gone
Caught in the cycle of an endless dawn
I press my helmet to the vibrating glass
Watching the shadows of the centuries pass

[Chorus]
In the static I found your voice
Through the crackle of the solar wind
In the static I found your voice
Where the silence of the void begins
A signal climbing through the cold debris
The only gravity that is pulling on me

[Verse]
The dashboard flickers with a spectrum of blue
Transmitting a sequence that leads back to you
It breathes through the wires of a dead relay
Translating the grief of a distant day
A constellation of data starts to ignite
Cutting a path through the permanent night

[Pre-Chorus]
The frequency trembles and begins to bloom
Filling the corners of my metal room
Every distortion is a breath I take
The only promise that didn't break

[Chorus]
In the static I found your voice
Through the crackle of the solar wind
In the static I found your voice
Where the silence of the void begins
A signal climbing through the cold debris
The only gravity that is pulling on me
